panels.title: ${sym} — Variational vs all CEX mids + cex_avg consensus (white dashed)
panels.description: All venues with the symbol overlaid. Variational uses underlying_price (LP fair quote). CEX use bid-ask mid. Watch for systematic offset or oscillation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "variational" FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bybit" FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bitget" FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "mexc" FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

WITH ticks AS (SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT ts time, avg(mid) "cex_avg" FROM ticks timestamp(ts) SAMPLE BY 2s ALIGN TO CALENDAR ORDER BY ts

panels.title: ${sym} — divergence vs Binance (bp). CEXes only.
panels.description: Each venue's mid minus Binance mid in bp. Variational shows the LP's fair-value vs the live CEX consensus.

targets.rawSql: WITH v AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT v.timestamp time, (v.mid-b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Variational-Binance" FROM v ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY v.timestamp

WITH bb AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT bb.timestamp time, (bb.mid-b.mid)/b.mid*10000 "Bybit-Binance" FROM bb ASOF JOIN b ORDER BY bb.timestamp

panels.title: Live snapshot — all venues + freshness (last 5min)
panels.description: Current mid + max age. Stale data shown as old timestamps. Use this to detect dead feeds.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'variational' venue, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid, max(timestamp) latest, count() n FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'binance', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bybit', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'gate', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'mexc', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bingx', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'hyperliquid', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'aster', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol = concat('${sym}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'lighter', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), max(timestamp), count() FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-5,now())

panels.title: Variational vs each CEX — basis stats (30min)
panels.description: ASOF-joined basis between Variational and each CEX. High std + low |mean| = best mean-revert candidate.

targets.rawSql: WITH v AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), b AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bb AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), g AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), m AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bx AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), h AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), a AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), l AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM lighter_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT 'V-Binance' pair, count() n, round(avg((v.mid-b.mid)/b.mid*10000),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp((v.mid-b.mid)/b.mid*10000),2) std_bp FROM v ASOF JOIN b UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Bybit', count(), round(avg((v.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN bb UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Bitget', count(), round(avg((v.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN bg UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Gate', count(), round(avg((v.mid-g.mid)/g.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-g.mid)/g.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN g UNION ALL SELECT 'V-MEXC', count(), round(avg((v.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN m UNION ALL SELECT 'V-BingX', count(), round(avg((v.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN bx UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Hyperliquid', count(), round(avg((v.mid-h.mid)/h.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-h.mid)/h.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN h UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Pancake', count(), round(avg((v.mid-p.mid)/p.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-p.mid)/p.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN p UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Aster', count(), round(avg((v.mid-a.mid)/a.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-a.mid)/a.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN a UNION ALL SELECT 'V-Lighter', count(), round(avg((v.mid-l.mid)/l.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((v.mid-l.mid)/l.mid*10000),2) FROM v ASOF JOIN l ORDER BY std_bp DESC

panels.title: ${sym} — Variational vs CEX-only avg vs CEX+HL consensus
panels.description: consensus = mean(binance, bybit, bitget, gate, mexc, bingx, hyperliquid). Watch where variational diverges from the cross-CEX consensus.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "variational" FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

WITH ticks AS (SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT ts time, avg(mid) "consensus" FROM ticks timestamp(ts) SAMPLE BY 2s ALIGN TO CALENDAR ORDER BY ts

WITH ticks AS (SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT ts time, avg(mid) "cex_only" FROM ticks timestamp(ts) SAMPLE BY 2s ALIGN TO CALENDAR ORDER BY ts

panels.title: ${sym} — Variational vs CEX-only & vs CEX+HL consensus (bp)
panels.description: Live divergence between Variational LP quote and the cross-CEX-and-HL average mid. Sustained large gap = LP mispriced or stale.

targets.rawSql: WITH cons AS (  WITH ticks AS (  SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())  ) SELECT ts, avg(mid) consensus FROM ticks timestamp(ts) SAMPLE BY 2s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), v AS (SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT v.ts time, (v.mid - cons.consensus)/cons.consensus*10000 "V - consensus bp" FROM v ASOF JOIN cons ON ts ORDER BY v.ts

WITH cex AS (  WITH ticks AS (  SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','_USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())   UNION ALL SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol=concat('${sym}','-USDT') AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())  ) SELECT ts, avg(mid) cex_avg FROM ticks timestamp(ts) SAMPLE BY 2s ALIGN TO CALENDAR), v AS (SELECT timestamp ts, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM variational_bookticker WHERE symbol='${sym}' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT v.ts time, (v.mid - cex.cex_avg)/cex.cex_avg*10000 "V - CEX-only bp" FROM v ASOF JOIN cex ON ts ORDER BY v.ts
